scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:programs: cargo build-sbf --manifest-path programs/stablecoin/Cargo.toml --sbf-out-dir target/deploy && cargo build-sbf --manifest-path programs/transfer-hook/Cargo.toml --sbf-out-dir target/deploy && cargo build-sbf --manifest-path programs/sss-registry/Cargo.toml --sbf-out-dir target/deploy
scripts.frontend:deploy: npm run build:frontend && npm run frontend:export
scripts.test: npm run build && node tests/run-tests.mjs all
